notes: Forest/infantry/economy specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, found in a large forest biome; ALL of its buildings can be placed directly on Forest tiles (terrainException), not just Lumber Mill. Forest Yard builds Quad-bike (its only unlock — ignores the forest vehicle-block rule); Barracks (shared building type — see data/buildings/barracks.json for the full list of bases that build it) gives Treehouse its own infantry roster too. No specialty defense building — relies on generic Turret/Missile Launcher plus Walls. +100% Wood bonus is a building-scoped resourceModifiers entry on Lumber Mill (multiplier 2.0), not a base-wide bonus, mirroring Foundry Reach's +100% Steel pattern.
